Hero.description: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering designs, structures, and accompanies projects where architectural beauty meets technical precision. From the initial idea to completion, each space is thought out with rigor, matter, light, and responsibility.

Blueprint.label: OUR PROCESS
Blueprint.title: Every line becomes matter. Every decision becomes space.
Blueprint.description: Before the construction site, there is precision. Before the form, there is analysis. Our process accompanies each project from understanding the need to technical coordination and final delivery.

Manifesto.label: OUR PHILOSOPHY
Manifesto.subtitle: Architecture as an artistic act and technical responsibility.
lines: We do not only draw buildings.
We give a sustainable form to ideas.
Manifesto.description:
For ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering, every project begins with a clear intention: understand the place, the program, the uses, and the future impact of the space. Our mission is to translate this intention into a precise, controlled, and sensitive architecture, capable of standing the test of time.

We believe that a successful project is never limited to its image. It must be right in its design, coherent in its structure, intelligent in its technical choices, and human in its daily experience.

Services.label: WHO WE ARE
Services.title: An integrated vision of architecture, engineering, and execution.
Services.subtitle: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering supports clients, developers, institutions, businesses, and individuals in the design, study, coordination, and valuation of their projects. Our approach gathers several complementary expertises: architecture, engineering, technical studies, BIM consulting, urban planning, development, interior design, works coordination, client assistance, and professional training.

Apropos.label: BEHIND THE TRANSFORMATION
Apropos.subtitle: Civil Engineer · Construction Project Manager · Doctoral Researcher in Architecture
Apropos.quote: Architecture is an art that embraces science. It must be sensitive in its vision, rigorous in its method, and responsible in its impact.
Apropos.description:
Soukaina Elaouad leads ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering with a strong conviction: an architectural project can only succeed when it unites imagination, technical precision, rigorous management, and deep understanding of the context.

Her background in civil engineering, construction project management, and architectural research allows her to approach every mission with a transversal vision. For her, building does not only mean producing a form, but designing a framework of life, anticipating uses, respecting the territory, and sustainably integrating economic, social, cultural, and environmental constraints.

Events.label: ELAOUAD EVENTS
whyItems: Meet qualified specifiers and decision makers.
Present your products, services, and innovations to a professional audience.
Develop your network in Morocco, Africa, and internationally.
Associate your brand with an event specialized in design and layout.

Formations.label: ELAOUAD COURSES
Formations.title: Train the professionals capable of designing, managing, and building tomorrow.
Formations.description: ELAOUAD Courses offers practical training in the areas of architecture, construction, BIM, 3D software, project management, site supervision, and interior design. The programs are designed to bring theory closer to the field and help learners develop directly exploitable skills.
Formations.pillar1Desc: BIM, TILOS, construction project management, site supervision, structural calculations, utilities, urbanism, land law.
Formations.pillar2Desc: AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp Pro, 3ds Max, Archicad, Tekla, Covadis, Mensura, MS Project.
Formations.pillar3Desc: 3D interior decoration, space optimization, well-being, introduction to decoration.
Formations.ctaRegisterDesc: Select your theme and plan your professional path with our experts.

CallToAction.label: START A COLLABORATION
headlineLines: Your project deserves a clear vision

Cinematic.label: Process
Cinematic.title: From vision to matter
Cinematic.step1Desc: Read the site, clarify uses and place the first lines.
Cinematic.step2Desc: Align architecture, BIM, structure and engineering before construction.
Cinematic.step3Desc: Transform intent into a durable, precise and inhabited place.
